title: ophrys candica var. lyciensis
intro: Ophrys candica var. lyciensis, also known as the bee orchid or false bee orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Ophrys candica var. lyciensis include its ability to help soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
